model_specification_line: res = smf.wls('full_time ~ treatment + age + C(sex) + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='HC1')
sample_selection: ACS survey years 2013 through 2016 to focus on the post-DACA rollout
Hispanic-Mexican detailed origins (hispan == 1, hispand in {100, 102, 103, 104, 105, 106, 107}) and born in Mexico (bpl == 200)
Noncitizen respondents (citizen == 3) aged 18 to 34 to capture the target labor-market cohort
